transcript.text:
[This place filled with cooking smell]
[Jeonju Jeon House in Seoul, Dongjak-gu]
Hello everyone
I'm here at a Jeon place (Korean fritters/pancakes) to celebrate Chuseok (Korean Thanksgiving Holidays)
Instead of just eating today, Well, I did this last year too!
Cook some traditional fritters for the hardworking Firefighters working over the holidays
Here's the owner that will help me with make Jeon
You're going to a fire station? You're doing God's work
She is a local neighbor of my restaurant
I had your tteokboki before
It was so good!
I went twice
Let's get this started
Let's get the cooking started
[This video was filmed in compliance with COVID-19 quarantine guidelines]
It hurts to see these people work over the holidays

These people work for the good of others
We are so blessed to have them
Tzuyang, How many servings this time?
30-40 servings!
[We'd better get started]
[The owner's daughter hard at work]
[Me too]
Oops!
[I've done it again]
[Trying to get rid of the evidence]
[Caught on the scene]
[Let's show them what's up]
[Unstoppable flips]
[This is almost like a different TV show]
[All flipped in seconds]
I am donating this from my pocket

Really? Thank you
[Well then let's work extra hard]
[That speed]
Let me work like the pros too
I can't do it
[But not too shabby at flipping]
That's pretty good
[Wanja-jeon (Pan-fried meat & tofu)]
I can do it too!
That's difficult
[Dongtaejeon (pollock pancakes)]
[Kimchi and Potato pancakes]
Take a break and have a taste
Looks so good
I made them myself
It's so good!

I was worried that I didn't cook it right But it's perfect
Dongtaejeon
[Spicy Skate]
Yum
[When are you going to start working?]
The assorted skewer is so big Is this forreal?
This is very big
Everything here is big actually Even the other pancakes
Tzuyang, let's get back to work Come over here
[1 more bite, please]
Finished
Thank you firefights for being there for our country
Thank you for always working hard for us
You have our support
[Delicious looking traditional pancakes]
[Ready for delivery]

Let's head out now
[Putting out fires for the citizens at any time and anywhere]
[Korean firefighters]
[Incheon Gongdan Fire Station]
It's Jeon
You guys are not able to go home to see family members during the holidays
Thank you for preparing this for us
Since you're here...
[1 day firefighter Tzuyang]
I wore it last year too
[Even have her own name tag]
Now I'm going to shadow them around to see what it's like to be a firefighter
[Change into fire protection suit]
It feels like a space suit
Do you get to get some days off during the holiday?
We all come to work

I'm never able to drive down home
We are always on standby to fulfill our duties
Use that nozzle to destroy a part of the building
to make way for the water to get inside
And put out the fire that way
[Let's see what it's all about]
[Very powerful]
I'll try it myself now
Thank you
That's hard It was very heavy
[Let's get a ride too]
I'll turn on the sirens for you
It's so much louder in here
You can hear this from a distance And it's very loud to be right next to it
Thank you for everything
[Doing something from this height?]

Rope rappel
For rescue missions or facility removals
[An example]
[Will she be able to do it?]
[Ready]
[Rappel]
[Doing much better than expected]
Very good
You're good That was nicely done
And next
She's not barking
She won't bark at anyone with our uniform She knows we're her coworkers
[She is a rescue]
We rescue a lot of animals
Now to reduce house fires
we're going to install facility equipment

To celebrate Chuseok
We made Jeon for you
That looks very good
Thank you for doing this for us
You're giving us too much
Thank you so much
I'm going to install a detector for you
This will be in your kitchen
When it senses smoke, the alarm will go off
[Check to see if it works well]
it makes that sound
I will leave this here
Really really She is the boss
That was well done
Thank you Enjoy your meal
Stay healthy Thank you

[Onto the next]
So grateful
Thank you~!
Let's all install the fire extinguisher and the smoke detector
make it obligatory in every household excluding apartments and dorm rooms
We are able to reduce fires just by having these items
Staying away from the fire is the first time to do
It's good to have this in hand so that the fire can be put out
[Now let's eat]
That's a lot of food
[This video was filmed in compliance with COVID-19 quarantine guidelines]
Thank you for the food
It's so delicious
Very good
We prepared a small cake for Tzuyang
This character is called "Hero"

Give her a round of applause
Thank you once again for always working hard for us day and night
You guys have to hold the ground so that our citizens can safely go home to see their loved ones
[Thank you all firefighters that work during the holidays]
[Have a safe Chuseok holiday everyone!] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
